draft docs / pre-v0

Troubleshooting

Troubleshooting docs will become concrete as the v0 runtime surfaces real failure modes.

Overview Install pre-v0 Configuration draft Code structure pre-v0 Cost receipts draft Permissions draft Troubleshooting pre-v0
pre-v0 placeholder

Expected topics

Indexing failures

Parser errors, ignored paths, large files, unsupported languages, and stale graphs.

Provider setup

Missing credentials, model routing, rate limits, and cache behavior.

Verification

Scoped checks, failing tests, and graph-selected verification commands.

Permissions

Denied shell commands, write approvals, and web access policy.

sq SqueezyAgent

A local static engine helps the agent understand code structure before wasting LLM tokens on search.
